notes: Seam #518 DONE (PR #536 merged aba6877). Rolled forward to #537 commitment-pool hygiene. This branch ships #537 Fix A — the external-promisor staleness gate: detectDiscrepancies() now drops stale external-promisor zombies (counterparty-as-subject phrasing + due/implied-due in the past + no fresh extraction touch in 21d) from the commitment pool before any extractor runs, so the Columbia Motors callback pattern can never become a candidate (and never burns a retry). Pure, unit-testable chokepoint in lib/briefing/discrepancy-detector.ts (not daily-brief-generate.ts as the issue text guessed — candidates aren't individually exposed there); canonical_form added to the scorer commitment fetch. Proof: lib/briefing 846 tests green incl. 13 new Fix A tests; typecheck clean. Fix B (marketing-sender extraction filter) and Fix C (fuzzy dedup) remain open under #537. Owner-only blocker unchanged: Vercel FOLDERA_SELF_USER_ID = 2cbc1bab so Slack cards fire.
